info.title: KSeF Integration
info.description: Custom connector for KSeF (Krajowy System e-Faktur) integration. Provides invoice management, KSeF synchronization, AI categorization, and VAT White List lookup.

get.description: Returns a list of invoices with advanced filtering options. Supports pagination, date ranges, MPK, supplier, and payment status filters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search in invoice number and supplier name

get.description: Returns detailed information about a single invoice including AI categorization data.

patch.description: Updates invoice metadata such as MPK, category, payment status. Requires Admin role.

delete.description: Soft deletes an invoice. Requires Admin role.

post.description: Creates a new invoice from manual entry (not from KSeF). Automatically sets source='Manual'. Requires Admin role.
Initializes a new authenticated session with KSeF API. Required before sync operations. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns current KSeF session status and details.

delete.description: Terminates the current active KSeF session. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns overall KSeF integration status including token validity and connection health.

connected.description: Whether connection to KSeF is active

post.description: Synchronizes incoming invoices from KSeF. Downloads new invoices and imports them to Dataverse. Requires Admin role.

dateFrom.description: Start date for sync (defaults to 30 days ago)

dateTo.description: End date for sync (defaults to today)

importAll.description: Import all found invoices without confirmation

post.description: Queries KSeF for invoices matching criteria. Does not import - use for preview.

get.description: Returns all KSeF configuration settings (one per company NIP).

post.description: Creates a new KSeF configuration for a company. Requires Admin role.

400.description: Invalid request or NIP already exists

get.description: Returns KSeF configuration for a specific company.

patch.description: Updates KSeF configuration. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns available cost centers for invoice categorization.

post.description: Uses AI to suggest MPK and category for an invoice based on supplier and items. Requires Admin role.
Categorizes multiple invoices using AI. Max 50 invoices per request. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns aggregated invoice statistics including totals, monthly breakdown, top suppliers, and payment status.

post.description: Search for a subject in the White List of VAT Taxpayers (Biała Lista) by NIP or REGON. Returns company details, VAT status, registered bank accounts.

404.description: Subject not found in White List

get.description: Offline NIP validation (checksum algorithm only, no API call).

post.summary: Check Bank Account in VAT White List
post.description: Verify whether a bank account number is registered for a given NIP in the White List.

get.description: Basic health check endpoint. Does not require authentication.

keyVaultSecretName.description: Key Vault secret name for KSeF token
